UpdateSourceArgs: -c "if [[ -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}.wineprefix/system.reg\" ]]; then echo \"Wine prefix already exists. Skipping.\"; exit 0; fi; rm -rf \"{{$FullRootDir}}.wineprefix\" 2>/dev/null; echo \"Initialising Wine prefix...\"; WINEPREFIX=\"{{$FullRootDir}}.wineprefix\" WINEDLLOVERRIDES=\"mscoree=d;mshtml=d\" HOME=\"{{$FullBaseDir}}\" /usr/bin/xvfb-run -a /opt/wine-stable/bin/wineboot --init 2>&1; /opt/wine-stable/bin/wineserver -w 2>/dev/null; if [[ -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}.wineprefix/system.reg\" ]]; then echo \"Wine prefix initialised.\"; exit 0; else echo \"Wine prefix creation failed.\"; exit 1; fi"

-c "CFG=\"{{$FullBaseDir}}conf/initial_config_win.cfg\"; if [[ -f \"$CFG\" ]]; then sed -i 's/set render_system \"dx12\"/set render_system \"dx11\"/' \"$CFG\" && echo \"Set render_system to dx11\"; else echo \"Config file not found: $CFG\"; fi"
